title: UKSSSC Assistant Agriculture Officer Recruitment 2026, Check Full Details & Apply Online -
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://sssc.uk.gov.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the

paragraphs: UKSSSC Assistant Agriculture Officer Recruitment 2026: The Uttarakhand Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UKSSSC) has issued a notification for the position of Assistant Agriculture Officer . The recruitment drive comprises 90 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 21-06-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the UKSSSC Assistant Agriculture Officer Recruitment 2026 is provided below.
